ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The initial public offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the stock's metadata */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the company is headquartered */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange (e.g., New York, London) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the exchange */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* The operating hours of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the exchange's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the given time */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for corporate actions like dividends and splits */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the price data (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the indicator record */,
  "ma" REAL /* Moving average of the stock price */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative strength index of the stock */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving average convergence/divergence of the stock */,
  "signal" REAL /* Signal line of the MACD */,
  "volume_ma" REAL /* Moving average of the trading volume */,
  "atr" REAL /* Average true range, a measure of volatility */,
  "stochastic_k" REAL /* Stochastic oscillator %K value */,
  "stochastic_d" REAL /* Stochastic oscillator %D value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view stock) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client device */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_volume" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the volume record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the volume data (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg) */,
  "volume_type" TEXT /* The type of volume (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_volume_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upper_band" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each band record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the band record */,
  "upper" REAL /* Upper band value */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the band data (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg) */,
  "period" INTEGER /* The period over which the band is calculated (e.g., 20 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upper_band_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "basis_band" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each band record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the band record */,
  "basis" REAL /* Basis band value */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the band data (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg) */,
  "period" INTEGER /* The period over which the band is calculated (e.g., 20 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_basis_band_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lower_band" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each band record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the band record */,
  "lower" REAL /* Lower band value */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the band data (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg) */,
  "period" INTEGER /* The period over which the band is calculated (e.g., 20 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lower_band_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "histogram" (
  "histogram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each histogram record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the histogram record */,
  "histogram" REAL /* Histogram value */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the histogram data (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg) */,
  "period" INTEGER /* The period over which the histogram is calculated (e.g., 20 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("histogram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_histogram_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
